mapper.select: SELECT id, abnormality_id AS abnormalityId, processor, process_method AS processMethod, process_date AS processDate, review_date AS reviewDate, abnormal_occurred_date AS abnormalOccurredDate, process_opinion AS processOpinion, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM abnormality_deal WHERE abnormality_id = #{abnormalityId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO abnormality_deal ( abnormality_id, processor, process_method, process_date, review_date, abnormal_occurred_date, process_opinion, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{abnormalityId}, #{processor}, #{processMethod}, #{processDate}, #{reviewDate}, #{abnormalOccurredDate}, #{processOpinion}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
